meta.title: Internship Task Document
meta.description: Frontend Internship Technical Assessment — Handlebars + Vite
meta.author: Engineering Team

hero.title: Frontend Development Task
hero.subtitle: Build a dynamic document page using modern tooling

sections.title: Objective
sections.content: Recreate a professional internship task document webpage using Handlebars as the templating engine and Vite as the bundler. The goal is to demonstrate your ability to work with modern frontend tooling, dynamic data binding, and clean UI design — all within a structured project setup.

items.name: Handlebars
items.desc: Semantic templating engine with partials, helpers, and dynamic data binding from JSON.

items.name: Vite
items.desc: Lightning-fast build tool with HMR dev server and optimized production builds.

items.name: CSS3
items.desc: Custom properties, grid/flexbox layout, responsive breakpoints, and smooth transitions.

items.name: Node.js
items.desc: Runtime environment powering the build pipeline, package management, and scripts.

sections.title: Requirements
items: Use Handlebars (.hbs) templates — no plain HTML-only approach
Implement reusable Handlebars partials for header and footer
Configure Vite to process and compile Handlebars templates
Output final built HTML into the /dist directory
Enable hot-reload dev server via npm run dev
Include at least: Title, Sections, Bullet points, and Links
Create a clean, modern, fully responsive UI
Add hover effects on all interactive elements
Include meta tags and a favicon

sections.title: Deliverables
items: Complete project source code with the specified folder structure
At least two Handlebars partials (header and footer)

items.label: Handlebars.js Documentation
items.desc: Official guide covering expressions, partials, helpers, and built-in blocks.

items.label: Vite Official Docs
items.desc: Configuration, plugins, build options, and the complete Vite API reference.

items.label: vite-plugin-handlebars
items.desc: The plugin that bridges Vite's build pipeline with Handlebars template processing.

items.label: MDN CSS Reference
items.desc: Complete reference for CSS properties, selectors, and modern layout techniques.

footer.note: This document is part of a frontend internship evaluation.
